title: post api v1 auth login with valid credentials
description: Test the POST /api/v1/auth/login endpoint with valid user credentials to ensure it returns a 200 status and a JWT token for authentication.

title: post api v1 auth register with valid email and password
description: Test the POST /api/v1/auth/register endpoint with a valid email and strong password to verify it creates a new user and returns a 201 Created status with the user id.

title: get api v1 users me with valid jwt token
description: Test the GET /api/v1/users/me endpoint with a valid JWT token in the Authorization header to retrieve the current authenticated user's profile and organization memberships, expecting a 200 status.

title: get api v1 organizations with valid jwt token
description: Test the GET /api/v1/organizations endpoint with a valid JWT token to list organizations the user belongs to, expecting a 200 status with an array of organizations.

title: post api v1 organizations with valid payload
description: Test the POST /api/v1/organizations endpoint with a valid JWT token and valid organization payload to create a new organization, expecting a 201 Created status with the organization id.

title: get api v1 organizations orgid projects with valid membership
description: Test the GET /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/projects endpoint with a valid JWT token and an orgId where the user is a member, expecting a 200 status with a list of projects.

title: get api v1 organizations orgid projects with non member user
description: Test the GET /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/projects endpoint with a valid JWT token where the user is not a member of the organization, expecting a 403 Forbidden status.

title: get api v1 organizations orgid projects with non existent orgid
description: Test the GET /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/projects endpoint with a valid JWT token and a non-existent orgId, expecting a 404 Not Found status.

title: get api v1 organizations orgid projects projectid secrets with valid jwt token
description: Test the GET /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/projects/:projectId/secrets endpoint with a valid JWT token to retrieve a list of encrypted secret metadata for the specified project, expecting a 200 status.

title: get api v1 organizations orgid audit with admin or owner role
description: Test the GET /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/audit endpoint with a valid JWT token as an ADMIN or OWNER role to retrieve paginated audit log entries, expecting a 200 status.
